title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese presents 9 Claude code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce token spending, and extend Claude's capabilities with web scraping, media generation, and model switching. The plugins reviewed include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic skill and security tools, and BuildPartner, among others.
